positive: A highly detailed, stylized, symmetrical illustration of a majestic howling wolf, depicted in a minimalist linework style combined with intricate geometric mandalas. The wolf should be the central subject, captured in profile against a vibrant, cosmic background that gradients from deep indigo to emerald teal. Incorporate forest elements like stylized moon phases, scattered constellations, and interwoven thorny branches in the negative space. Use bold, contrasting black lines on a pure white background for optimal print clarity and apparel suitability. Composition must be centered and highly impactful, utilizing high contrast and clean, strong silhouettes. Vector art aesthetic, engraving style, graphic design, zen tattoo art, occultism, high contrast illustration.
negative: blur, artifacts, smudges, text, watermarks, logos, trademarks, celebrity likeness, copyrighted characters, artist name, noise, grainy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, photo, photograph, 3d render, color gradient on subject, messy, cluttered, dirty
